title: baccaurea dulcis
intro: Baccaurea dulcis, also known as the Java plum or Mountain apple, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Baccaurea dulcis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Baccaurea dulcis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and its fruits can be eaten raw or used in jams and preserves.
